_comment: Fields that were removed from the node model but still haunt prose. Consumed by scripts/prose_check.py, which fails any DESCRIPTION that still steers one of them. Records (ADRs, gate reviews) are exempt — they describe a past in which these fields were real, and rewriting history is exactly what a record forbids. When you retire a field, add it here in the same PR; that is what makes the retirement stick instead of decaying into folklore.

retired.stage: retired with the node teardown (epic #11) — node lifecycle/maturity is delegated to the board, not declared. A venture's funnel position is a different axis: use `gate_decision`.
retired.mvp_stage: retired with the health-scorecard work — maturity is derived at read time (scripts/health.py), not declared.
retired.risk_category: retired with the health-scorecard work — risk is derived, not declared.
retired.node.md: the node-as-file model was torn down 2026-06-12 (PR #104). The structured truth is catalog.yaml; the prose is decisions/<slug>.md.
